records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Systematized (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Systematizing (?).]

defs: To reduce to system or regular method; to arrange methodically; to methodize; as, to systematize a collection of plants or minerals; to systematize one's work; to systematize one's ideas.
quotes: Diseases were healed, and buildings erected, before medicine and architecture were systematized into arts.
